questions.questionText: What does the word 'Muslim' mean?
What is 'Salam' and its significance?
According to Hadith, spreading 'Salam' (greetings of peace) leads to what?
answers: Love among Muslims and entry to Paradise

questions.questionText: What is 'Istighfar'?
How many times did the Prophet (PBUH) say he seeks forgiveness daily?
What is 'Salawat' upon the Prophet?
answers: Sending blessings and peace upon Prophet Muhammad

questions.questionText: According to the Quran, who are the 'Ulul-Azm' prophets?
What does 'Ulul-Azm' mean?
answers: The prophets of strong determination and resolve

questions.questionText: What is 'Hikmah' (Wisdom) in the Quran?
answers: It refers only to the Quran
Deep understanding, often associated with the Sunnah or sound judgment

questions.questionText: What does 'Khalifah' (Caliph) mean?
What is 'Janazah' prayer?
How many Takbirs are in the Janazah prayer?
What is the Islamic ruling on attending a funeral?
According to Hadith, visiting the sick is a right of the Muslim upon another. What other rights are mentioned?
answers: Lending money and helping in work
Returning greetings, following funerals, accepting invitations, saying Yarhamukallah when sneezing

questions.questionText: What is the concept of 'Shafa'ah' (Intercession) in Islam?
answers: Seeking intercession from the Prophet or righteous on the Day of Judgment with Allah's permission

questions.questionText: Which prophet will be given the 'Maqam al-Mahmud' (Praised Station) on the Day of Judgment?
What is 'Al-Hawd' (The Pool/Basin) of the Prophet?
answers: A basin from which believers will drink on the Day of Judgment

questions.questionText: What is the river of Paradise mentioned in Surah Al-Kawthar?
What are the names of rivers in Paradise mentioned in the Quran?
answers: Rivers of water, milk, wine, and honey

questions.questionText: Which Surah describes events of the Day of Judgment with stars falling and oceans erupting?
Which Surah begins 'When the sky is cleft asunder'?
What is the 'Trumpet' (As-Sur) in Islamic eschatology?
answers: The horn blown by Israfil to signal the Day of Judgment

questions.questionText: How many times will the Trumpet be blown?
What happens at the first blowing of the Trumpet?
What happens at the second blowing of the Trumpet?
What is 'Yawm al-Qiyamah'?
According to the Quran, who will be the first to be resurrected?
What is the Islamic position on 'Ruh' (Soul)?
answers: Its true nature is known only to Allah (17:85)

questions.questionText: Which Surah contains the verse 'And they ask you about the soul...'?
What is 'Ithm' in Islam?
What are 'Kaba'ir' in Islam?
According to Hadith, which sin is the greatest?
What is 'Gheebah' (backbiting)?
answers: Mentioning something about someone that they would dislike

questions.questionText: What is 'Buhtan' (slander)?
What does the Quran compare backbiting to?
answers: Eating the flesh of one's dead brother (49:12)

questions.questionText: What is 'Hasad' (Envy) and its ruling?
answers: It is prohibited and warned against in both Quran and Hadith
It is not mentioned in Islam

questions.questionText: According to Hadith, 'Beware of envy, for envy...'
answers: ...devours good deeds as fire devours wood

questions.questionText: What is the 'Adhan'?
What is the 'Iqamah'?
answers: The second call immediately before the prayer begins

questions.questionText: What is the supplication said between the Adhan and Iqamah?
answers: Du'a is accepted and not rejected at this time

questions.questionText: What is 'Ijtihad' in Islamic jurisprudence?
answers: Independent reasoning by a qualified scholar

questions.questionText: What is 'Taqlid'?
answers: Following a qualified scholar's opinion without knowing the evidence

questions.questionText: What is 'Fatwa'?
answers: A non-binding religious ruling issued by a scholar

questions.questionText: Who is a 'Mufti'?
answers: A scholar qualified to issue Fatwas

questions.questionText: What is the difference between a Mufti and a Qadi?
answers: A Mufti issues non-binding opinions; a Qadi issues binding judicial decisions

questions.questionText: Which Surah mentions the creation of humans from clay?
answers: It is not mentioned in the Quran

questions.questionText: What is the significance of 'Surah Al-Waqiah' according to Hadith?
Which Surah is recommended to recite before sleeping?
According to Hadith, reciting the last two verses of Surah Al-Baqarah at night is sufficient for what?
What is 'Mizab ar-Rahmah' (Spout of Mercy)?
answers: The golden spout on the Kaaba

questions.questionText: What is the 'Hatim' (Hijr Ismail) near the Kaaba?
answers: A semi-circular wall part of the original Kaaba structure built by Ibrahim

questions.questionText: What is the 'Multazam' of the Kaaba?
answers: The area between the Black Stone and the Kaaba door where du'as are accepted

questions.questionText: What is the 'Maqam Ibrahim' (Station of Abraham)?
answers: The stone with Ibrahim's footprint near the Kaaba

questions.questionText: What are 'Harakat' in Arabic?
What is 'Waqf' in Tajweed?
What is 'Idgham' in Tajweed?
What is 'Madd' in Tajweed?
What is 'Ghunnah' in Tajweed?
answers: A nasal sound when pronouncing Noon or Meem

questions.questionText: Who added the dots to Arabic letters in the Quran?
What is the Battle of Qadisiyyah (636 CE)?
answers: A decisive battle where Muslims defeated the Sassanid (Persian) Empire

questions.questionText: Who led the Muslim forces at the Battle of Qadisiyyah?
Who was Abu Ubaidah ibn al-Jarrah?
answers: A trusted companion called 'Amin al-Ummah' (Trustee of the Nation)

questions.questionText: What is 'Al-Ashmaat' in the context of Quran?
answers: Multiple valid readings (Qira'at) of the Quran

questions.questionText: How many recognized Qira'at (readings) of the Quran are there?
Who was the first Hafiz (memorizer) of the Quran?
What is 'Tanzil' vs 'Ta'wil' in Quranic studies?
answers: Tanzil is the literal/revealed meaning; Ta'wil is deeper interpretation

questions.questionText: Which companion memorized the most Quran according to tradition?
What is 'Sujud al-Tilawah'?
answers: Prostration upon reciting or hearing certain verses of the Quran

questions.questionText: How many places of Sujud al-Tilawah are in the Quran?
What is 'Tadabbur' of the Quran?
answers: Deep reflection and pondering over the meanings

questions.questionText: Which prophet is mentioned in the Quran as having been given wisdom as a child?
Which prophet's people worshipped a golden calf?
Who made the golden calf for the Israelites?
Who was 'Qarun' (Korah) in the Quran?
answers: A wealthy man from Musa's people who was arrogant about his wealth

questions.questionText: What happened to Qarun according to the Quran?
answers: The earth swallowed him and his dwelling

questions.questionText: Who was 'Luqman' mentioned in the Quran?
answers: A wise man who advised his son

questions.questionText: What was Luqman's first advice to his son?
answers: Do not associate partners with Allah (avoid Shirk)

questions.questionText: What is 'Jumu'ah' prayer's ruling?
How many rakats are Fard in Jumu'ah prayer?
What is special about the hour of acceptance on Friday?
answers: There is an hour when du'a is accepted

questions.questionText: According to Hadith, which day is the 'master of days'?
What is recommended to recite on Friday?
What is 'I'tikaf' and when is it typically observed?
answers: Secluding oneself in the mosque, typically in the last 10 days of Ramadan

questions.questionText: What is 'Zakat al-Fitr'?
answers: Obligatory charity paid before Eid al-Fitr prayer

questions.questionText: What is the amount of Zakat al-Fitr?
answers: One Sa'a (approximately 2.5-3 kg) of staple food per person

questions.questionText: What is the Battle of Ain Jalut (1260 CE) significant for?
answers: The Mamluks defeated the Mongols, stopping their westward advance

questions.questionText: Who led the Muslim forces at the Battle of Ain Jalut?
What is the concept of 'Wilayah' in Islam?
answers: Authority, guardianship, and closeness to Allah

questions.questionText: What is the significance of the 'Talbiyah' during Hajj?
answers: It is a prayer for rain
The repeated chant 'Labbayk Allahumma Labbayk' declaring response to Allah's call

questions.questionText: What does 'Labbayk Allahumma Labbayk' mean?
answers: Here I am, O Allah, here I am

questions.questionText: What is 'Muzdalifah' in the context of Hajj?
answers: An open area where pilgrims stay overnight after leaving Arafat

questions.questionText: What are the days of Tashreeq?
What is 'Shafa' and 'Witr' prayer?
answers: Even and odd-numbered night prayers after Isha

questions.questionText: What does 'Al-Asma al-Husna' refer to?
According to Hadith, how many names does Allah have?
What does 'Ar-Rahman' (one of Allah's names) mean?
answers: The Most Gracious / The Most Merciful

questions.questionText: What does 'Al-Hakim' (one of Allah's names) mean?
What does 'Al-Wadud' (one of Allah's names) mean?
What is the significance of 'Laylat al-Bara'ah'?
answers: The 15th of Sha'ban, a night of forgiveness according to some traditions

questions.questionText: Which famous Islamic scholar is known as 'Hujjat al-Islam' (Proof of Islam)?
What is the Islamic term for 'seeking knowledge'?
According to Hadith, 'Seeking knowledge is an obligation upon...'
What is 'Dawah'?
answers: Inviting others to Islam / sharing Islamic knowledge

questions.questionText: What does the Quran say about diversity of nations and tribes?
answers: It is so that people may know one another (49:13)

questions.questionText: Which verse of the Quran states there is no compulsion in religion?
What is an 'Imam' in the context of prayer?
answers: The person who leads the congregational prayer

questions.questionText: What is 'Sutra' in the context of prayer?
answers: An object placed in front of the praying person as a barrier

questions.questionText: What is 'Khushu' in prayer?
answers: Humility, focus, and devotion during prayer

questions.questionText: According to Hadith, what is the key to Paradise?
What did Prophet Muhammad (PBUH) say about smiling?
answers: It is a waste of time

questions.questionText: What is the Islamic view on cleanliness?
What is 'Fitrah' in Islam?
answers: The natural disposition/innate nature of humans inclined towards God

questions.questionText: Which Surah tells the story of the companions of the elephant (Abraha's army)?
What is the Surah that follows Al-Fil and mentions the Quraysh tribe?
What is 'Al-Istiwa' in Islamic theology?
answers: Allah's attribute of rising over the Throne (a matter of creed)

questions.questionText: What concept does 'Tawassul' refer to?
answers: Seeking means of nearness to Allah through righteous deeds or persons

questions.questionText: Which companion pledged under a tree at Hudaybiyyah?
What is 'Bay'at ar-Ridwan' and why is it significant?
answers: A pledge of allegiance under a tree, praised in the Quran (48:18)

questions.questionText: What does the Quran say about Prophet Ibrahim breaking the idols?
answers: He destroyed them to prove their powerlessness (21:57-67)

questions.questionText: Which prophet was a shepherd before prophethood (as were many prophets)?
answers: Both A and B among others

questions.questionText: According to Hadith, what did the Prophet say about poets?
Who was Hassan ibn Thabit?
What is the concept of 'Wala wal-Bara' in Islamic creed?
answers: Loyalty to the believers and disavowal of disbelief

questions.questionText: What is the 'Mus'haf'?
answers: The physical written copy of the Quran

questions.questionText: What is the importance of 'Surah Al-Hashr' (verses 22-24)?
answers: It contains many of Allah's Beautiful Names
It tells the story of Musa

questions.questionText: Which dynasty was known for the Alhambra palace in Spain?
What year did the last Muslim kingdom (Granada) fall in Spain?
What is the Islamic concept of 'Muhasabah'?
answers: Self-accounting and self-reflection on one's deeds

questions.questionText: According to Umar ibn al-Khattab, 'Hold yourselves accountable...'
answers: ...before you are held accountable (on the Day of Judgment)
